title: mesosphaerum multiflorum
intro: Mesosphaerum multiflorum, also known as Mexican tea or bee balm, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum multiflorum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
